column25:
📘 THE HOME TUITIONS 📄 Tutor Registration Brochure — 

 ⭐ Tutor Registration Plans (Non-Refundable)
Every plan includes ✨ UNLIMITED tuition opportunities based on tutor performance, demo quality, and discipline.
🔹 ₹599 Plan
🕒 Validity: 6 Months
♾️ Unlimited tuition opportunities during validity
🎯 Perfect for tutors beginning their journey
📈 Good for building experience & confidence
______________________________
🔹 ₹999 Plan
🗓️ Validity: 1 Year
♾️ Unlimited tuition opportunities for the entire year
🔥 Great for tutors seeking long-term, stable tuition flow
🚀 Higher chance of priority allocation
________________________________
🔹 ₹1999 Plan
🏆 Lifetime Validity
♾️ Unlimited tuition opportunities — Lifetime Access
👑 Best for tutors who want permanent access
💼 Zero renewal required.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

🚫 STRICT CANCELLATION POLICY (Most Important Section)
To maintain fairness, professionalism, and trust, the rules below are followed very strictly.

❌ 1. Taking Parent Contact But Not Attending the Demo
If you receive parent contact details and fail to attend the demo for ANY reason,
➡️ Instant Cancellation of Registration
❌ 2. Trying to Deal Directly With Parents
Any attempt to negotiate fees or bypass the organization.
➡️ Permanent & Irreversible Cancellation.

❌ 3. Three Unsuccessful Tuition Attempts (Major Rule)
Considered unsuccessful if you:
🚫 Miss the demo
🚫 Reject the tuition after allotment
🚫 Do not attend after confirming
🚫 Avoid or delay the assignment repeatedly
After 3 such failed attempts,

➡️ Your registration will be permanently cancelled. To get more opportunities you have to re - register yourself.
This ensures only serious, committed, and reliable tutors continue receiving opportunities.
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
💰 Payment & Service Details
👨‍🏫 Once registered, you become a Premium Tutor
💵 First month’s fee is handled by The Home Tuitions
🧾 A 50% service charge is applicable only for the first month. The payment will be released at the end of the first month.
📲 From the second month onward, parents pay tutors directly

📌 Before Applying for Any Tuition
Always confirm the following before you apply:
📍 Location
📚 Student class & subjects
💰 Fee structure
⏱️ Tuition timing & days
Apply only if you can attend, to avoid cancellation under the 3-attempt rule.
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________
✍️ Acknowledgement
By registering, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to follow ALL policies — especially the cancellation rules.
🌟 Team THE HOME TUITIONS
Supporting Tutors. Strengthening Education. Empowering Growth.
